item.title: PhD stipend in resilient communication for drone swarms
item.description:
University: Aalborg University
Country: Denmark

The Department of Electronic Systems at The Technical Faculty of IT and Design invites applications for a PhD stipend in the field of resilient communication for drone swarms within the general study programme Wireless Communications; as per September 1, 2026, or as soon as possible thereafter....


Posted: 2026-05-13
Source: scholarshipdb.net
item.dc:creator: scholarshipdb.net

item.title: One or more PhD stipends at the Center for Neuroplasticity and Pain (CNAP)
item.description:
University: Aalborg University
Country: Denmark

Are you enthusiastic about basic human pain research? The Center for Neuroplasticity and Pain (CNAP) at Aalborg University is recruiting several PhD fellows, to start 1st of September 2026 or soon hereafter. Who are we? CNAP strive to identify and modulate key features of human pain...

item.title: PhD Stipend/Integrated Stipend in Volitional Personality Change

Country: Denmark

The employment will be a fixed term, full-time position, which will...

item.title: PhD stipend in AI:GeoComm Lab for AI-based satellite communications and weather prediction
item.description:
University: Aalborg University
Country: Denmark

AI:X is an ambitious initiative at Aalborg University that aims to advance AI research and create real-world impact through interdisciplinary collaboration, and nine labs will be initiated in 2026 with a total of 18 PhD stipends. The AI:GeoComm Lab is part of the AI:X initiative with two PhD...

item.title: PhD position in Human-Centric Generative AI for Building Design and Controls
item.description:
University: Aalborg University
Country: Denmark

Be part of the future of creativity support for professionals at Aalborg University! This interdisciplinary project investigates how generative AI can be incorporated into the building design and operation process. Particularly, we seek to support architects to design more sustainable buildings...
